inputs.label: Number of Intervals (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of subintervals for trapezoidal rule

formulas.xValues: Array.from({length: numIntervals + 1}, (_, i) => lowerLimit + i * h)
formulas.yValues: xValues.map(x => { if (functionType === 1) return Math.sin(x); if (functionType === 2) return Math.cos(x); if (functionType === 3) return x * x; if (functionType === 4) return Math.exp(x); return 0; })
formulas.integral: h * (yValues[0] + yValues[yValues.length - 1] + 2 * yValues.slice(1, -1).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0)) / 2
